summary: Classified the five primary live-inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive signal was present in the hydrated artifact, and job permissions disable low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and PR creation. All primary PRs should remain open for their own maintainer/author review paths.
